heading: Definitions
label: 2296f Definitions
notes: Change of NameCommittee on International Relations of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Foreign Affairs of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Tenth Congress, .Jan. 5, 2007

children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 1 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate and the Committee on International Relations of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia
children.label: 2 Countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia
children.text: The term “countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia” means Armenia, Azerbaijan, Georgia, Kazakstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, and Uzbekistan.
